job_title: Telecom GIS & Data Analyst - Network Capacity Planning
strengths: Experience building ETL pipelines and automations
Dashboarding with Power BI and Tableau
weaknesses: No explicit telecom GIS experience listed
No hands-on ArcGIS/QGIS or MapInfo mention
Telecom network planning or capacity strategy not shown
improvement_bullets: Developed geospatial analysis workflows using Python and QGIS to map service footprints and optimize infrastructure expansion, directly informing strategic network capacity planning decisions.
Built spatial models and interactive dashboards in Power BI, integrating geographic datasets to visualize infrastructure gaps and provide actionable investment recommendations for market expansion.
Engineered ETL pipelines in Python and SQL to aggregate consumer demographics and network usage data, supporting large-scale geospatial analysis and competitive market intelligence.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to integrate GIS data into existing cloud-based environments (including GCP/AWS), enhancing the accuracy of spatial decision-making models.
Translated complex geospatial findings into executive-level business cases, driving infrastructure investment decisions through clear data storytelling and strategic mapping reports.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Telecom GIS & Data Analyst - Network Capacity Planning opportunity with Jobs via Dice. I am interested in this opportunity because of my deep passion for bridging the gap between raw data engineering and high-stakes infrastructure strategy. What interests me about working for Jobs via Dice is your reputation for enabling large-scale digital transformation, which inspires me because it aligns with my desire to tackle complex network expansion challenges at a national level. I believe my proficiency in building automated ETL pipelines and my ability to translate geospatial analysis into actionable business recommendations would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by focusing on the intersection of data accuracy and strategic utility. In fact, while analyzing a 2M+ row loan portfolio, I developed an end-to-end Python and PostgreSQL pipeline to identify high-risk segments, which allowed leadership to refine their portfolio strategy. Ultimately, I know that the Telecom GIS & Data Analyst - Network Capacity Planning role at Jobs via Dice would allow me to bring my advanced SQL and Python skills to build robust models for your network capacity planning. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst & Operations Lead enabled me to develop my skills in cross-functional collaboration and dashboarding. I led an initiative to replace manual reporting with automated Power BI dashboards, which improved KPI visibility and reduced processing time by 40%. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my geospatial modeling and data storytelling skills in working on infrastructure growth strategy at Jobs via Dice. I know that my technical background in Python/SQL and my experience in crafting data-driven business cases align with what it takes to succeed in this role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
